situationSummary: Substation A (132kV) has tripped. Grid frequency dropped from 50.0Hz to 48.1Hz. Shadow link detected: Pump Station 7 flow rate declining with 45-second lag, consistent with loss of power feed. Reservoir Alpha level rising due to heavy rainfall in Caldew catchment.
proposedAction: Monitor cascade propagation. Prepare playbook for preemptive pump isolation if Sub A does not recover within 5 minutes.
regulatoryBasis: Civil Contingencies Act 2004, Section 2 — duty to assess risk. Flood and Water Management Act 2010.

notes: Shadow link confidence 98% but based on 3 evidence windows
Rainfall intensity may be confounding pump flow readings
Sub A may auto-recover — waiting for grid operator confirmation
